headline: Wealthfront launches AI financial planning that adapts in real-time to life events
summary: Wealthfront has launched a new AI-driven financial planning layer that detects life events — job changes, income shifts, major purchases — from connected account activity and automatically adjusts the client's financial plan. The system uses natural language to explain every plan change and prompts the client only when a human decision is required. Wealthfront describes the goal as creating a financial plan that is 'always current, never stale.'
